text.tspan: Marcus carries a caseload of 30+ trauma-focused and general
clients at a resource-limited community clinic. Delivering
TF-CBT with fidelity while managing entirely paper-based,
multi-timepoint data collection stretches his time and
Keep families engaged for the full course of treatment
Have time to actually be present with clients, not just document them
Dashed curve = current, unresolved state · Emoji marks Marcus's felt emotion at each phase
